security_deposit.special_rules_local_overrides_note: Local ordinances and special housing programs can add stricter rules.

eviction.nonpayment_notice_type: 735 ILCS 5/9-210. OTHER LEASE VIOLATIONS. For violations other than nonpayment of rent, the landlord may serve a written notice specifying the nature of the violation and demanding remedy or surrender within 10 DAYS of service.
eviction.lease_violation_notice_type: 735 ILCS 5/9-210. OTHER LEASE VIOLATIONS. For violations other than nonpayment of rent, the landlord may serve a written notice specifying the nature of the violation and demanding remedy or surrender within 10 DAYS of service.

landlord_entry.allowed_entry_reasons_rule: (a) The landlord shall have the right of access to the dwelling unit at reasonable times with the consent of the tenant for the purpose of making inspections, alterations or repairs.
landlord_entry.entry_time_window_rule: (a) The landlord shall have the right of access to the dwelling unit at reasonable times with the consent of the tenant for the purpose of making inspections, alterations or repairs.
landlord_entry.penalty_for_illegal_entry_rule: Varies — confirm remedies (injunction, damages, attorney fees) under state law.

rent_increase.cap_rule: No statewide rent control; local rules may apply.
rent_increase.fixed_term_increase_allowed_rule: Varies — confirm your lease terms and statute.
rent_increase.month_to_month_increase_allowed_rule: Varies — generally allowed with proper notice.
rent_increase.delivery_method_rule: Varies — confirm written notice and delivery method requirements.
rent_increase.retaliation_protection_note: Retaliation protections may limit rent increases after protected tenant complaints; confirm local/state rules.

habitability.landlord_repair_duty_rule: Varies — confirm landlord repair/habitability duties in statute and local code.
habitability.tenant_notice_required_rule: If landlord fails to repair condition within 14 days of written notice that endangers health or safety, tenant in a building of 5 or more units may:
habitability.tenant_termination_for_unrepaired_condit: Varies — some states allow termination after notice and failure to repair.
habitability.code_enforcement_contact_rule: Varies — contact local housing/code enforcement (city/county) for inspections and official repair orders.
